From: "Jason Levin" <jlevin@samlegal.com>
Subject: Bear Stearns- Memo
Date: Wed, 16 Apr 2008 23:39:24 GMT
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
Cc: "Steven Storch" <sstorch@samlegal.com>

Darren,

Attached please find a working draft of the memorandum for your review.
We have been working to ensure that the overall theory comports with the
case law.  We believe the stock issue needs to be discussed further.  We
would like to have a conference call with you tomorrow morning (pending
your availability) to discuss further.

Regards, Jason 

 

Jason Levin

Storch Amini & Munves PC

2 Grand Central Tower, 25th Floor

New York, New York 10017

Tel: 212.490.4100

Direct: 212.497.8218

Fax: 212.490.4208

Confidentiality Notice: The information contained in this e-mail and any
attachments may be legally privileged and confidential. If you have
received this e-mail in error, please notify the sender and permanently
delete the e-mail and any attachments immediately. You should not
retain, copy or use this e-mail or any attachment for any purpose, nor
disclose all or any part of the contents to any person. Thank you.
